dependencies: Highly dependent on Spirit AeroSystems for fuselage and other components
Reliance on sole-source suppliers for certain items
Dependence on small number of sole-source suppliers
Qualification of alternative sources could take a year or more
Dependence on availability of raw materials: aluminum, titanium, composites
risks: Supply chain disruptions due to production quality issues
Supplier financial difficulties and delivery delays
Supplier performance problems affecting production schedules
Increased supplier prices adversely affecting business
Energy source availability and pricing risks

regulatory_risks: FAA increased oversight of production and quality management systems
FAA will not approve 737 production rate increases beyond 38 per month until compliance with quality and safety standards
FAA certification requirements for new aircraft models (777X, 737-7, 737-10)
European Union Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) certification requirements
U.S. government procurement regulations and compliance requirements
New procurement regulations or climate/cyber-related contractual disclosures
Domestic content threshold requirements for U.S. government contracts
Environmental regulations (discharge, treatment, storage, disposal of hazardous substances)
Climate change laws and greenhouse gas emissions regulations
California and European Union greenhouse gas emissions and climate risk reporting legislation
Export control restrictions and sanctions compliance
Cybersecurity compliance requirements on Defense Industrial Base
Pillar Two global minimum tax rules (15%)
Deferred Prosecution Agreement obligations with U.S. Department of Justice

sanction_risks: U.S.-China trade tensions and tariffs since 2018
Risk of inability to deliver aircraft to customers in China
Potential deterioration in geopolitical or trade relations between U.S. and other countries
Export restrictions and sanctions imposed by U.S. or other governments
Sanctions affecting supply chain, business partners, or customers
Compliance with U.S. and other government export control restrictions
